status_terms.VERIFY/TBD: Evidence or contractual confirmation may exist or may be available from the provider, but it has not been verified for HoloEngine buyer claims in this artifact.
status_terms.TBD: No sufficient HoloEngine-specific evidence has been captured in this artifact.
status_terms.Target: Intended control design, not a verified operating control.
status_terms.benchmark_evidence_mode: HoloVerify or related benchmark work where frozen prompts, raw outputs, traces, manifests, scoring maps, and failure notes may be preserved for reproducibility.
status_terms.production_customer_mode: Target HoloEngine production flow for bounded ALLOW/ESCALATE review requests.

provider_bound_data: minimum necessary bounded prompt content under approved configuration
customer request text or extracted operational facts if needed for review
source/evidence snippets if needed for review
route metadata required for provider call
production_customer_mode.claim_boundary: Do not claim implemented production handling, zero retention, or no customer payload exposure until deployment evidence and provider terms are verified.

benchmark_evidence_mode.claim_boundary: Do not describe benchmark evidence retention as production customer payload handling.

current_route_role: may be selected by target HoloEngine provider routing only under approved provider/vendor terms

data_sent_if_selected: minimum necessary bounded prompt content needed for ALLOW/ESCALATE review
role/system instructions for the selected HoloEngine route
customer request text or extracted operational facts required for review
route metadata required for the provider call
production_customer_mode.customer_payload_text_sent: VERIFY/TBD - if OpenAI is selected for a production provider route, customer payload text or extracted facts may be sent when needed for model review; deployed behavior must be verified.

benchmark_evidence_mode.customer_payload_text_sent: No production customer payload text should be present in benchmark/evidence mode; benchmark packet and prompt text may be sent.

risks: provider retention settings not verified for HoloEngine claims
mitigations: complete provider-specific terms and retention review
capture DPA evidence before buyer claims
map route/account/configuration to approved retention settings
keep production and benchmark/evidence mode claims separate

benchmark_evidence_mode.customer_payload_text_sent: No production customer payload text should be present in benchmark/evidence mode; benchmark packet and prompt text may be sent.

mitigations: complete provider-specific terms and retention review
capture DPA evidence before buyer claims
map route/account/configuration to approved retention settings
keep production and benchmark/evidence mode claims separate

customer request text or extracted operational facts required for review

production_customer_mode.customer_payload_text_sent: VERIFY/TBD - if MiniMax is selected for a production provider route, customer payload text or extracted facts may be sent when needed for model review; deployed behavior must be verified.

benchmark_evidence_mode.customer_payload_text_sent: No production customer payload text should be present in benchmark/evidence mode; benchmark packet and prompt text may be sent.

mitigations: complete provider-specific terms and retention review
capture DPA evidence before buyer claims
map route/account/configuration to approved retention settings
keep production and benchmark/evidence mode claims separate

potentially_provider_bound_in_production: role/system instructions for the selected HoloEngine route
bounded customer request text or extracted facts needed for review
operational facts, evidence references, or source snippets needed for ALLOW/ESCALATE evaluation
route, provider, model, retry, latency, token, and error metadata
tenant/request identifiers only where required for routing or audit, and only under approved design
potentially_preserved_in_benchmark_evide: operational notes for invalid or blocked runs
shared_data_classes.scoring_map_boundary: Scoring maps and answer keys must remain benchmark evidence artifacts and must not be treated as provider prompt content unless a separate, explicit, non-production evaluation design approves that exposure.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Provider retention settings are not verified for HoloEngine claims.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Complete provider-specific retention review, document configuration options, capture contract evidence, and map route behavior to approved settings before buyer commitments.
Legal/Trust review of provider terms and DPAs; store signed or accepted DPA evidence in the trust binder.
Build provider/subprocessor inventory, review provider subprocessor pages or contract exhibits, and create an update cadence.
Treat zero retention as unavailable for claims until contractually verified per provider and mapped to the actual HoloEngine route/account/configuration.
Do not pursue healthcare claims until BAA availability, HIPAA scope, product handling, access controls, audit controls, and legal review are complete.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Regional/data residency requirements may not match provider processing.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Define customer region requirements, verify provider regional processing/storage options, and add route-level restrictions where required.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Production customer payloads could be sent to providers without explicit approval or minimization.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Require provider route approval, data-sharing scope, prompt minimization, redaction tests, and audit metadata showing provider/model/route and evidence-retention mode.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Benchmark evidence could be confused with production customer data handling.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Keep HoloVerify evidence in separate storage, access control, retention policy, and claim language.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Raw prompts or raw provider outputs could be over-retained in production.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Default to metadata-only audit logs; require customer-enabled evidence-retention mode for payload artifacts; define retention, deletion, support access, and export controls.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Scoring maps or benchmark answer keys could leak into provider prompts.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Access-control scoring maps, exclude scoring maps from provider prompts, and add prompt-leakage tests before production or benchmark expansion.

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Provider fallback or model-route changes could alter data-sharing scope.
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Treat provider/model roster changes as change-managed events requiring approval, data-sharing review, and buyer-impact review if applicable.

buyer_safe_language: HoloEngine has a draft provider/data-handling matrix for enterprise trust review.
The matrix separates target production customer-mode handling from benchmark/evidence mode.
In target production mode, HoloEngine is designed to minimize provider-bound content to the prompt content needed for ALLOW/ESCALATE review.
Default production audit logging is a metadata-only target; customer payload text and raw provider outputs are excluded by default in the target design.
Customer-enabled evidence retention is a separate mode that requires explicit configuration, retention settings, access controls, and deletion procedures.
Provider retention settings, DPAs, subprocessors, zero-retention eligibility, BAA/HIPAA eligibility, and regional/data-residency posture are verification workstreams.
HoloVerify benchmark evidence is separate from production customer payload handling.
must_not_claim: OpenAI, xAI, or MiniMax provide zero retention for HoloEngine data.
HoloEngine has DPA coverage with OpenAI, xAI, or MiniMax.
HoloEngine has BAA coverage with OpenAI, xAI, or MiniMax.
HoloEngine is HIPAA compliant or HIPAA ready.
HoloEngine is SOC 2 compliant, SOC 2 certified, SOC 2 ready, or auditor validated.
HoloEngine production customer payloads are never sent to providers.
HoloEngine production customer payloads are never stored.
HoloEngine default audit logs, provider payloads, evidence-retention mode, backups, and support workflows have been verified end to end.
HoloEngine can guarantee customer regional processing or data residency.
Benchmark/evidence retention controls are equivalent to production customer data handling.
evidence_to_collect_next: Provider terms review for OpenAI, xAI, and MiniMax.
DPA review and evidence capture for each provider.
Subprocessor inventory and update cadence for each provider.
Provider retention setting review, including route/account/configuration evidence.
Zero-retention eligibility review for each provider, if available.
BAA/HIPAA eligibility review before any healthcare positioning.
Regional/data-residency review for customer deployment scenarios.
Production prompt-minimization evidence and redaction tests.
Customer-enabled evidence-retention configuration, retention, deletion, and support-access controls.
Benchmark/evidence storage, access-control, and retention separation proof.
